about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: My journey and what drives me
about.introduction: I'm a passionate software developer with a focus on creating user-friendly and efficient applications. With years of experience in the field, I've developed a strong understanding of software development principles and best practices.
about.philosophyText: I believe in writing clean, maintainable code and creating intuitive user experiences. I'm constantly learning new technologies and methodologies to improve my skills and deliver better solutions.
about.interestsText: Outside of coding, I enjoy hiking, reading about new technologies, and contributing to open-source projects.
